subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! The Sun of bounty shineth resplendent, the Ocean of grace is manifest, and the Heaven of loving-kindness is raised up. Yet most among humankind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله شمس جود مشرق و بحر فضل ظاهر و سماء عنایت مرتفع مع ذلک اکثری از ناس
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
